[REDACTED] {"data":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"E:\blog\_config.redefine.yml","content":"# >>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>> start
# THEME REDEFINE CONFIGURATION FILE V2
# BY EVANNOTFOUND
# GITHUB: https://github.com/EvanNotFound/hexo-theme-redefine
# DOCUMENTATION: https://redefine-docs.ohevan.com
# DEMO: https://redefine.ohevan.com
# <<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<< end

# BASIC INFORMATION >>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>> start
# Docs: https://redefine-docs.ohevan.com/basic/info
info:
  # Site title
  title: syee的博客
  # Site subtitle
  subtitle: "blog"
  # Author name
  author: syee
  # Site URL
  url: https://yee114514.github.io
# BASIC INFORMATION <<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<< end

# IMAGE CONFIGURATION >>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>> start
# Docs: https://redefine-docs.ohevan.com/basic/defaults
defaults:
  # Favicon
  favicon: /images/icon.svg
  # Site logo
  logo:
  # Site avatar
  avatar: /images/icon.svg
# IMAGE CONFIGURATION <<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<< end

# COLORS >>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>> start
# Docs: https://redefine-docs.ohevan.com/basic/colors
colors:
  #Primary color
  primary: "#A31F34"
  # Secondary color (TBD)
  secondary:
  # Default theme mode initial value (will be overwritten by prefer-color-scheme)
  default_mode: light # light, dark
# COLORS <<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<< end

# SITE CUSTOMIZATION >>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>> start
# Docs: https://redefine-docs.ohevan.com/basic/global
global:
  # Custom global fonts
  fonts:
    # Chinese fonts
    chinese:
      enable: true # Whether to enable custom chinese fonts
      family: "Microsoft YaHei" # Font family
      url: /fonts/msyh/msyh.css # Font URL to CSS file
    # English fonts
    english:
      enable: true # Whether to enable custom english fonts
      family: "consolas" # Font family
      url: "/fonts/consolas/consola.css" # Font URL to CSS file
    # Custom title fonts (navbar, sidebar)
    title:
      enable: false # Whether to enable custom title fonts
      family: # Font family
      url: # Font URL to CSS file
  # Content max width
  content_max_width: 1000px
  # Sidebar width
  sidebar_width: 210px
  # Effects on mouse hover
  hover:
    shadow: true # shadow effect
    scale: false # scale effect
  # Scroll progress
  scroll_progress:
    bar: false # progress bar
    percentage: true # percentage
  # Website counter
  website_counter:
    url: https://cn.vercount.one/js # counter API URL (no need to change)
    enable: true # enable website counter or not
    site_pv: true # site page view
    site_uv: true # site unique visitor
    post_pv: true # post page view
  # Whether to enable single page experience (using swup). See https://swup.js.org/. similar to pjax
  single_page: true
  # Whether to enable Preloader.
  preloader:
    enable: false
    custom_message: # Custom message. If empty, the site title will be displayed
  # Side tools settings
  side_tools:
    # Whether to enable gear rotation animation for settings button
    gear_rotation: true
    # Whether to auto expand tools list on page load
    auto_expand: false
  # Whether to enable open graph
  open_graph:
    enable: true
    image: /images/redefine-og.webp # default og:image
    description: Hexo Theme Redefine, Redefine Your Hexo Journey.
  # Google Analytics
  google_analytics:
    enable: false # Whether to enable Google Analytics
    id: # Google Analytics Measurement ID
# SITE CUSTOMIZATION <<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<< end

# FONTAWESOME >>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>> start
# Docs: https://redefine-docs.ohevan.com/basic/fontawesome
fontawesome: # Pro v6.2.1
  # Thin version
  thin: false
  # Light version
  light: false
  # Duotone version
  duotone: false
  # Sharp Solid version
  sharp_solid: false
# FONTAWESOME <<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<< end

# HOME BANNER >>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>> start
# Docs: https://redefine-docs.ohevan.com/home/home_banner
home_banner:
  # Whether to enable home banner
  enable: true
  # style of home banner
  style: fixed # static or fixed
  # Home banner image
  image:
    light: /images/background-light.webp # light mode
    dark: /images/background-dark.webp # dark mode
  # Home banner title
  title: syee的博客
  # Home banner subtitle
  subtitle:
    text: # subtitle text, array
    hitokoto: # 一言配置
      enable: true # Whether to enable hitokoto
      show_author: true # Whether to show author

{"data":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"E:\blog\node_modules\hexo-theme-redefine\layout\components\scripts.ejs","content":"<%- renderJS('main.js', {
    module: true
}) %>

<% if (theme.footer.runtime) { %>
    <%- renderJS('libs/odometer.min.js') %>
    <%- renderCSS('assets/odometer-theme-minimal.css') %>
<% } %>

<% const subtitleConfig = theme.home_banner.subtitle || {}; %>
<% const subtitleText = subtitleConfig.text; %>
<% const subtitleEntries = Array.isArray(subtitleText)
    ? subtitleText
    : subtitleText
      ? [subtitleText]
      : []; %>
<% if (subtitleEntries.length !== 0 || (subtitleConfig.hitokoto && subtitleConfig.hitokoto.enable)) { %>
  <%- renderJS('libs/Typed.min.js') %>
<% } %>

<% if (theme.plugins.mermaid.enable) { %>
    <% if (theme.plugins.mermaid.version === '11.4.1') { %>
        <%- renderJS('libs/mermaid.min.js') %>
    <% } else { %>
        <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mermaid@<%= theme.plugins.mermaid.version %>/dist/mermaid.min.js"></script>
    <% } %>
<% } %>

<% const pageData = getPageData(page); %>
<% const isMasonryPage = pageData && pageData.partial === "pages/masonry/masonry"; %>
<% if (theme.masonry || theme.photos || theme.gallery || isMasonryPage) { %>
    <%- renderJS('libs/minimasonry.min.js', { swupReload: true }) %>
<% } %>

<%- renderJS('libs/moment-with-locales.min.js', { swupReload: true }) %>
<% if (theme.articles.pangu_js) { %>
    <%- renderJS('libs/pangu.min.js') %>
<% } %>

_What are the important files? In short, what do they contain and why are they relevant?_
已通过 Grep 定位到以下关键文件（均位于 node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/）：

**打字动画相关：**
- `source/js/libs/Typed.min.js` — Typed.js 库（打字动画核心库）
- `source/js/plugins/typed.js` — 主题封装的 typing 插件，调用 Typed.js 并配置动画参数
- `source/js/build/libs/Typed.min.js` — 构建后的 Typed.js
- `source/js/build/plugins/typed.js` — 构建后的 typed 插件
- `source/js/main.js` — 主 JS 文件，可能在此初始化 typing 和 hitokoto
- `source/js/build/main.js` — 构建后的主 JS 文件

**配置文件：**
- `_config.redefine.yml` (L133-144) — hitokoto 和 typing 相关配置：
  - `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.enable: true` — 启用一言
  - `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.show_author: true` — 显示作者
  - `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.api: https://v1.hitokoto.cn` — 一言 API

_What is actively being worked on right now? Pending tasks not yet completed. Immediate next steps._
已成功读取所有关键源码文件，完全理解了 typing 动画和 hitokoto 获取的实现逻辑。核心问题已定位：

**问题根因：** `typed.js` 中 hitokoto 启用时，只在创建 Typed 实例前 fetch 一次 API，然后用同一个文本循环 typing。即使 `loop: true`，也只是重复打字/退格相同的句子。

**解决方案：** 修改 `typed.js`，利用 Typed.js 的 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调（在退格完成后触发）。当 hitokoto 启用且 loop 为 true 时：
1. 首次创建 Typed 实例（loop 设为 false，单次循环）
2. 在 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调中重新 fetch hitokoto API
3. 用新文本重新创建 Typed 实例
4. 如此形成无限循环，每次都展示不同的句子

**待实施：** 修改 `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/plugins/typed.js` 和对应的 build 版本 `source/js/build/plugins/typed.js`。","replace_all":false}

# Session Title
_A short and distinctive 5-10 word descriptive title for the session. Super info dense, no filler_
Hexo Redefine 副标题打字动画后重新获取一言

# Current State
_What is actively being worked on right now? Pending tasks not yet completed. Immediate next steps._
已定位到关键文件但尚未成功读取源码。通过 Grep 在 node_modules 中搜索到主题 JS 文件路径，但 Read 调用均返回 internal error。下一步需要重新尝试读取以下文件以理解 typing 动画和 hitokoto 获取的具体实现逻辑，找到 backspace 完成的回调点。

# Task specification
_What did the user ask to build? Any design decisions or other explanatory context_
用户的个人博客使用 Hexo + GitHub Pages，主题为 Redefine。该主题有一个副标题自动获取一言(hitokoto)的功能，但目前只有刷新页面才会重新获取新的一言。用户希望在副标题打字动画的退格(backspace)阶段完成后，自动获取一句新的一言句子，实现每轮打字动画循环展示不同的句子。

# Files and Functions
_What are the important files? In short, what do they contain and why are they relevant?_
已通过 Grep 定位到以下关键文件（均位于 node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/）：

**打字动画相关：**
- `source/js/libs/Typed.min.js` — Typed.js 库（打字动画核心库）
- `source/js/plugins/typed.js` — 主题封装的 typing 插件，调用 Typed.js 并配置动画参数
- `source/js/build/libs/Typed.min.js` — 构建后的 Typed.js
- `source/js/build/plugins/typed.js` — 构建后的 typed 插件
- `source/js/main.js` — 主 JS 文件，可能在此初始化 typing 和 hitokoto
- `source/js/build/main.js` — 构建后的主 JS 文件

**配置文件：**
- `_config.redefine.yml` (L133-144) — hitokoto 和 typing 相关配置：
  - `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.enable: true` — 启用一言
  - `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.show_author: true` — 显示作者
  - `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.api: https://v1.hitokoto.cn` — 一言 API
  - `home_banner.subtitle.typing_speed: 100` — 打字速度(ms)
  - `home_banner.subtitle.backing_speed: 80` — 退格速度(ms)
  - `home_banner.subtitle.starting_delay: 500` — 开始延迟(ms)
  - `home_banner.subtitle.backing_delay: 1500` — 退格延迟(ms)
  - `home_banner.subtitle.loop: true` — 是否循环
  - `home_banner.subtitle.smart_backspace: true` — 智能退格

**待确认：** 源码文件 Read 调用均返回 internal error，尚未实际读取文件内容。关键修改点应该在 typed.js 或 main.js 中，在 typing 动画 backspace 完成回调中注入重新请求 hitokoto API 的逻辑。

- `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/plugins/typed.js` — typing 插件，包含 hitokoto fetch 和 Typed 实例创建逻辑。**需要修改此文件。**
- `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/build/plugins/typed.js` — 构建后的 minified 版本，**需同步修改。**

**关键函数和逻辑（typed.js 源码）：**
- `createTyped(id, strings, options)` — 创建 Typed 实例的封装函数，会先 destroy 旧实例再创建新实例
- `destroyInstance(id)` — 销毁 Typed 实例并清空 DOM 元素
- `initTyped(id)` — 入口函数，判断 hitokoto 是否启用：
  - **hitokoto 启用时 (L100-129)：** fetch API → 获取 quote 和 author → 拼接文本 → 调用 createTyped。**问题：只 fetch 一次，loop 只是重复相同文本。**
  - **hitokoto 未启用时 (L132-138)：** 使用配置中的固定 subtitle 文本数组
- `config` (L65-73) — 从 `theme.home_banner.subtitle` 导出配置参数

**Typed.js 实例创建参数 (L49-57)：**
```js
new window.Typed(`#${id}`, {
  strings,           // 要打字的字符串数组
  typeSpeed,         // 打字速度
  smartBackspace,    // 智能退格
  backSpeed,         // 退格速度
  backDelay,         // 退格延迟
  loop,              // 是否循环
  startDelay,        // 开始延迟
});
```

**Typed.js 关键回调（未在当前代码中使用，修改时可用）：**
- `onLastStringBackspaced(self)` — 所有字符串退格完成后触发，**这是注入重新获取 hitokoto 逻辑的最佳时机**
- `onComplete(self)` — 打字完成后触发
- `onDestroy(self)` — 实例销毁后触发

**调用链：**
- `main.js` L152-167 → 检查 `location.pathname === config.root` → 调用 `initTyped("subtitle")`
- `main.js` L83-86 → 页面刷新事件 `redefine:page:refresh` 监听器 → 触发 `initPage()` → 重新调用 `initTyped("subtitle")`

**配置文件 `_config.redefine.yml` (L133-144)：**
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.enable: true`
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.show_author: true`
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.api: https://v1.hitokoto.cn`
- `home_banner.subtitle.typing_speed: 100` / `backing_speed: 80` / `starting_delay: 500` / `backing_delay: 1500`
- `home_banner.subtitle.loop: true` / `smart_backspace: true`","replace_all":false}

3. 用新文本重新创建 Typed 实例

_What is actively being worked on right now? Pending tasks not yet completed. Immediate next steps._
所有源码分析已完成。核心问题已定位并确认：

**问题根因：** `typed.js` 中 hitokoto 启用时（L100-129），只 fetch 一次 API，然后用 `createTyped(id, [text], options)` 创建 Typed 实例。options 中 `loop: true`（来自配置 `usrLoop: subtitleConfig.loop`），但 loop 只是重复 typing/backspace **同一个文本**，不会重新 fetch。

**解决方案：** 修改 `typed.js` 源文件和 build 文件：
1. hitokoto 启用时，不传 loop（或设为 false），改传 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调
2. 回调内重新 fetch hitokoto API，获得新句子后调用 `createTyped` 重建实例
3. `createTyped` 已内置 `destroyInstance` 逻辑，会自动清理旧实例再创建新的
4. 如此形成 fetch → type → backspace → fetch → type → backspace... 的无限循环，每轮展示不同句子

# Session Title
_A short and distinctive 5-10 word descriptive title for the session. Super info dense, no filler_
Hexo Redefine 副标题打字动画后重新获取一言

# Current State
_What is actively being worked on right now? Pending tasks not yet completed. Immediate next steps._
已成功读取所有关键源码文件，完全理解了 typing 动画和 hitokoto 获取的实现逻辑。核心问题已定位：

**问题根因：** `typed.js` 中 hitokoto 启用时，只在创建 Typed 实例前 fetch 一次 API，然后用同一个文本循环 typing。即使 `loop: true`，也只是重复打字/退格相同的句子。

**解决方案：** 修改 `typed.js`，利用 Typed.js 的 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调（在退格完成后触发）。当 hitokoto 启用且 loop 为 true 时：
1. 首次创建 Typed 实例（loop 设为 false，单次循环）
2. 在 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调中重新 fetch hitokoto API
3. 用新文本重新创建 Typed 实例
4. 如此形成无限循环，每次都展示不同的句子

**待实施：** 修改 `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/plugins/typed.js` 和对应的 build 版本 `source/js/build/plugins/typed.js`。

# Task specification
_What did the user ask to build? Any design decisions or other explanatory context_
用户的个人博客使用 Hexo + GitHub Pages，主题为 Redefine。该主题有一个副标题自动获取一言(hitokoto)的功能，但目前只有刷新页面才会重新获取新的一言。用户希望在副标题打字动画的退格(backspace)阶段完成后，自动获取一句新的一言句子，实现每轮打字动画循环展示不同的句子。

# Files and Functions
_What are the important files? In short, what do they contain and why are they relevant?_
**核心修改文件（源码）：**
- `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/plugins/typed.js` — typing 插件，包含 hitokoto fetch 和 Typed 实例创建逻辑。**需要修改此文件。**
- `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/build/plugins/typed.js` — 构建后的 minified 版本，**需同步修改。**

**关键函数和逻辑（typed.js 源码）：**
- `createTyped(id, strings, options)` — 创建 Typed 实例的封装函数，会先 destroy 旧实例再创建新实例
- `destroyInstance(id)` — 销毁 Typed 实例并清空 DOM 元素
- `initTyped(id)` — 入口函数，判断 hitokoto 是否启用：
  - **hitokoto 启用时 (L100-129)：** fetch API → 获取 quote 和 author → 拼接文本 → 调用 createTyped。**问题：只 fetch 一次，loop 只是重复相同文本。**
  - **hitokoto 未启用时 (L132-138)：** 使用配置中的固定 subtitle 文本数组
- `config` (L65-73) — 从 `theme.home_banner.subtitle` 导出配置参数

**Typed.js 实例创建参数 (L49-57)：**
```js
new window.Typed(`#${id}`, {
  strings,           // 要打字的字符串数组
  typeSpeed,         // 打字速度
  smartBackspace,    // 智能退格
  backSpeed,         // 退格速度
  backDelay,         // 退格延迟
  loop,              // 是否循环
  startDelay,        // 开始延迟
});
```

**Typed.js 关键回调（未在当前代码中使用，修改时可用）：**
- `onLastStringBackspaced(self)` — 所有字符串退格完成后触发，**这是注入重新获取 hitokoto 逻辑的最佳时机**
- `onComplete(self)` — 打字完成后触发
- `onDestroy(self)` — 实例销毁后触发

**调用链：**
- `main.js` L152-167 → 检查 `location.pathname === config.root` → 调用 `initTyped("subtitle")`
- `main.js` L83-86 → 页面刷新事件 `redefine:page:refresh` 监听器 → 触发 `initPage()` → 重新调用 `initTyped("subtitle")`

**配置文件 `_config.redefine.yml` (L133-144)：**
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.enable: true`
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.show_author: true`
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.api: https://v1.hitokoto.cn`
- `home_banner.subtitle.typing_speed: 100` / `backing_speed: 80` / `starting_delay: 500` / `backing_delay: 1500`
- `home_banner.subtitle.loop: true` / `smart_backspace: true`

# Session Title
_A short and distinctive 5-10 word descriptive title for the session. Super info dense, no filler_
Hexo Redefine 副标题打字动画后重新获取一言

# Current State
_What is actively being worked on right now? Pending tasks not yet completed. Immediate next steps._
所有源码分析已完成。核心问题已定位并确认：

**问题根因：** `typed.js` 中 hitokoto 启用时（L100-129），只 fetch 一次 API，然后用 `createTyped(id, [text], options)` 创建 Typed 实例。options 中 `loop: true`（来自配置 `usrLoop: subtitleConfig.loop`），但 loop 只是重复 typing/backspace **同一个文本**，不会重新 fetch。

**解决方案：** 修改 `typed.js` 源文件和 build 文件：
1. hitokoto 启用时，不传 loop（或设为 false），改传 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调
2. 回调内重新 fetch hitokoto API，获得新句子后调用 `createTyped` 重建实例
3. `createTyped` 已内置 `destroyInstance` 逻辑，会自动清理旧实例再创建新的
4. 如此形成 fetch → type → backspace → fetch → type → backspace... 的无限循环，每轮展示不同句子

**JS 加载路径：** `renderJS` helper（theme-helpers.js L102-172）在非 developer 模式下加载 `js/build/` 下的 minified 文件，developer 模式加载 `js/` 源码。当前 `developer.enable: false`，所以实际加载 build 版本。

**待实施：** 修改源文件 `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/plugins/typed.js` 和 build 文件 `source/js/build/plugins/typed.js`，然后 `hexo generate` 重新生成。

# Task specification
_What did the user ask to build? Any design decisions or other explanatory context_
用户的个人博客使用 Hexo + GitHub Pages，主题为 Redefine。该主题有一个副标题自动获取一言(hitokoto)的功能，但目前只有刷新页面才会重新获取新的一言。用户希望在副标题打字动画的退格(backspace)阶段完成后，自动获取一句新的一言句子，实现每轮打字动画循环展示不同的句子。

# Files and Functions
_What are the important files? In short, what do they contain and why are they relevant?_
**核心修改文件（源码）：**
- `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/plugins/typed.js` — typing 插件，包含 hitokoto fetch 和 Typed 实例创建逻辑。**需要修改此文件。**
- `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/build/plugins/typed.js` — 构建后的 minified 版本，**需同步修改。**

**关键函数和逻辑（typed.js 源码）：**
- `createTyped(id, strings, options)` — 创建 Typed 实例的封装函数，会先 destroy 旧实例再创建新实例
- `destroyInstance(id)` — 销毁 Typed 实例并清空 DOM 元素
- `initTyped(id)` — 入口函数，判断 hitokoto 是否启用：
  - **hitokoto 启用时 (L100-129)：** fetch API → 获取 quote 和 author → 拼接文本 → 调用 createTyped。**问题：只 fetch 一次，loop 只是重复相同文本。**
  - **hitokoto 未启用时 (L132-138)：** 使用配置中的固定 subtitle 文本数组
- `config` (L65-73) — 从 `theme.home_banner.subtitle` 导出配置参数

**Typed.js 实例创建参数 (L49-57)：**
```js
new window.Typed(`#${id}`, {
  strings,           // 要打字的字符串数组
  typeSpeed,         // 打字速度
  smartBackspace,    // 智能退格
  backSpeed,         // 退格速度
  backDelay,         // 退格延迟
  loop,              // 是否循环
  startDelay,        // 开始延迟
});
```

**Typed.js 关键回调（未在当前代码中使用，修改时可用）：**
- `onLastStringBackspaced(self)` — 所有字符串退格完成后触发，**这是注入重新获取 hitokoto 逻辑的最佳时机**
- `onComplete(self)` — 打字完成后触发
- `onDestroy(self)` — 实例销毁后触发

**调用链：**
- `main.js` L152-167 → 检查 `location.pathname === config.root` → 调用 `initTyped("subtitle")`
- `main.js` L83-86 → 页面刷新事件 `redefine:page:refresh` 监听器 → 触发 `initPage()` → 重新调用 `initTyped("subtitle")`

**配置文件 `_config.redefine.yml` (L133-144)：**
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.enable: true`
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.show_author: true`
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.api: https://v1.hitokoto.cn`
- `home_banner.subtitle.typing_speed: 100` / `backing_speed: 80` / `starting_delay: 500` / `backing_delay: 1500`
- `home_banner.subtitle.loop: true` / `smart_backspace: true`

messageText: Now I have a clear picture of the architecture. Let me check if there's a minifier available in the project.

Now I have a thorough understanding of the code. Let me summarize the problem and the plan.

**Current behavior:** When hitokoto is enabled with `loop: true`, the `initTyped` function fetches ONE sentence from the hitokoto API, creates a Typed.js instance with `loop: true`, and it loops the **same** sentence forever.

**Goal:** After each full type-and-backspace cycle, fetch a NEW hitokoto sentence.

**How it works:** Typed.js v2.0.12 has an `onLastStringBackspaced` callback that fires right after the last string is fully backspaced and before the loop restarts. I'll use this hook to re-fetch a new hitokoto and restart, instead of relying on Typed.js's built-in `loop`.

The change touches two files:
- Source file: `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/plugins/typed.js`
- Build file: `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/build/plugins/typed.js`

Let me make the changes.

2. 回调内重新 fetch hitokoto API，获得新句子后调用 `createTyped` 重建实例

4. 如此形成 fetch → type → backspace → fetch → type → backspace... 的无限循环，每轮展示不同句子

() => { runHitokotoCycle() } : undefined })`。`shouldLoop` 取自原始 `options.loop`，确保只有用户配置 `loop: true` 时才循环获取新句子，`loop: false` 时只打字一次后停止。","replace_all":false}

{"file_path":"C:\Users\15198\.claude\projects\E--blog\memory\user_profile.md","content":"---
name: user profile
description: Blog owner using Hexo + GitHub Pages with Redefine theme, Chinese speaker, comfortable modifying theme source
type: user
---

toolInput:
{"file_path":"C:\Users\15198\.claude\projects\E--blog\memory\theme_js_architecture.md","content":"---
name: theme JS architecture
description: Redefine theme has dual source/build JS files; both must be updated when modifying theme JS
type: project
---

The Redefine theme serves JavaScript from `source/js/build/` by default (minified files). When `developer.enable` is set to `true` in `_config.redefine.yml`, it serves from `source/js/` instead (unminified source). The `renderJS` helper in `scripts/helpers/theme-helpers.js` controls this routing.

**Why:** When modifying theme JavaScript in node_modules, both the source file AND the corresponding build file must be updated. If only the source is changed, the changes won't take effect because the site loads the build version.

**How to apply:** Any time theme JS is modified, identify the source file (e.g., `source/js/plugins/typed.js`) and its build counterpart (e.g., `source/js/build/plugins/typed.js`), update both, then run `npx hexo generate` to verify the output.
"}

{"file_path":"C:\Users\15198\.claude\projects\E--blog\memory\typed_hitokoto.md","content":"---
name: typed.js hitokoto cycling
description: How the subtitle typing animation and hitokoto fetching interact, and the change made to re-fetch on each cycle
type: project
---

The Redefine theme uses Typed.js v2.0.12 for the home banner subtitle typing animation, configured via `_config.redefine.yml` under `home_banner.subtitle`. When hitokoto is enabled, it fetches a random Chinese sentence from the hitokoto API. The typing plugin is at `source/js/plugins/typed.js`.

The modified behavior (2026-05-01): Instead of fetching one hitokoto and looping the same text, the code now uses Typed.js's `onLastStringBackspaced` callback to re-fetch a new hitokoto after each full type-and-backspace cycle. The `initTokens` Map mechanism ensures the cycle stops cleanly when the user navigates away (swup page transitions).

**Why:** The user wanted fresh hitokoto sentences after each typing animation cycle, not just on page refresh.

**How to apply:** If the theme is updated, these changes will be overwritten and need to be re-applied. The change is in the hitokoto-enabled branch of `initTyped()` — it wraps the fetch in a `runHitokotoCycle()` recursive function and overrides `loop: false` while hooking `onLastStringBackspaced` to trigger the next cycle.
"}

# Session Title
_A short and distinctive 5-10 word descriptive title for the session. Super info dense, no filler_
Hexo Redefine 副标题打字动画后重新获取一言

# Current State
_What is actively being worked on right now? Pending tasks not yet completed. Immediate next steps._
源码文件 `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/plugins/typed.js` 已修改完成，加入了递归 `runHitokotoCycle()` 机制：当 `shouldLoop` 为 true 时，利用 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调在每轮退格结束后重新 fetch hitokoto 并调用 `createTyped` 重建实例。

**待完成：**
1. 同步修改 build 文件 `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/build/plugins/typed.js`
2. 运行 `hexo generate` 重新生成静态文件
3. 部署验证

**修改逻辑说明：** 在 `initTyped` 函数内新定义一个 `runHitokotoCycle()` 递归函数，内部 fetch hitokoto API → 获取 quote 和 author → 生成文本 → 调用 `createTyped(id, [text], { ...options, loop: false, onLastStringBackspaced: shouldLoop ? () => { runHitokotoCycle() } : undefined })`。`shouldLoop` 取自原始 `options.loop`，确保只有用户配置 `loop: true` 时才循环获取新句子，`loop: false` 时只打字一次后停止。

# Task specification
_What did the user ask to build? Any design decisions or other explanatory context_
用户的个人博客使用 Hexo + GitHub Pages，主题为 Redefine。该主题有一个副标题自动获取一言(hitokoto)的功能，但目前只有刷新页面才会重新获取新的一言。用户希望在副标题打字动画的退格(backspace)阶段完成后，自动获取一句新的一言句子，实现每轮打字动画循环展示不同的句子。

# Files and Functions
_What are the important files? In short, what do they contain and why are they relevant?_
**核心修改文件（源码）：**
- `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/plugins/typed.js` — typing 插件，包含 hitokoto fetch 和 Typed 实例创建逻辑。**需要修改此文件。**
- `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/build/plugins/typed.js` — 构建后的 minified 版本，**需同步修改。**

**关键函数和逻辑（typed.js 源码）：**
- `createTyped(id, strings, options)` — 创建 Typed 实例的封装函数，会先 destroy 旧实例再创建新实例
- `destroyInstance(id)` — 销毁 Typed 实例并清空 DOM 元素
- `initTyped(id)` — 入口函数，判断 hitokoto 是否启用：
  - **hitokoto 启用时 (L100-129)：** fetch API → 获取 quote 和 author → 拼接文本 → 调用 createTyped。**问题：只 fetch 一次，loop 只是重复相同文本。**
  - **hitokoto 未启用时 (L132-138)：** 使用配置中的固定 subtitle 文本数组
- `config` (L65-73) — 从 `theme.home_banner.subtitle` 导出配置参数

**Typed.js 实例创建参数 (L49-57)：**
```js
new window.Typed(`#${id}`, {
  strings,           // 要打字的字符串数组
  typeSpeed,         // 打字速度
  smartBackspace,    // 智能退格
  backSpeed,         // 退格速度
  backDelay,         // 退格延迟
  loop,              // 是否循环
  startDelay,        // 开始延迟
});
```

**Typed.js 关键回调（未在当前代码中使用，修改时可用）：**
- `onLastStringBackspaced(self)` — 所有字符串退格完成后触发，**这是注入重新获取 hitokoto 逻辑的最佳时机**
- `onComplete(self)` — 打字完成后触发
- `onDestroy(self)` — 实例销毁后触发

**调用链：**
- `main.js` L152-167 → 检查 `location.pathname === config.root` → 调用 `initTyped("subtitle")`
- `main.js` L83-86 → 页面刷新事件 `redefine:page:refresh` 监听器 → 触发 `initPage()` → 重新调用 `initTyped("subtitle")`

**配置文件 `_config.redefine.yml` (L133-144)：**
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.enable: true`
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.show_author: true`
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.api: https://v1.hitokoto.cn`
- `home_banner.subtitle.typing_speed: 100` / `backing_speed: 80` / `starting_delay: 500` / `backing_delay: 1500`
- `home_banner.subtitle.loop: true` / `smart_backspace: true`

messageText: The code looks correct. Let me also do a quick sanity check to make sure the main.js references the correct typed module.

The build completed successfully and the generated output is correct. Here's a summary of the changes:

**Problem:** With `loop: true` and hitokoto enabled, Typed.js fetched one sentence and looped the same text forever. A new sentence was only fetched on page refresh.

**Solution:** Modified two files in `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/plugins/` (source + build):

- **`typed.js`** (source) — lines 100-148: Instead of fetching once and passing `loop: true` to Typed.js, the hitokoto path now wraps the fetch in a `runHitokotoCycle()` function. It creates a Typed instance with `loop: false` and uses the `onLastStringBackspaced` callback to re-fetch a new sentence after each full type-and-backspace cycle. This creates an infinite loop of fresh hitokoto sentences.

- **`typed.js`** (build) — equivalent minified changes.

**How it works:**
1. Fetch a hitokoto → create Typed instance → type it out → backspace
2. `onLastStringBackspaced` fires → fetch next hitokoto → destroy old instance → create new one → repeat
3. If the fetch fails and `loop: true`, it retries after 3 seconds
4. The existing `initTokens` mechanism ensures the cycle stops cleanly on page navigation

The behavior when `loop: false` is unchanged (types once, then stops).
The site built successfully. Let me verify the generated output contains the correct code.

**待完成：**
1. 部署到 GitHub Pages 验证实际效果

**修改逻辑说明：** 在 `initTyped` 函数内新定义一个 `runHitokotoCycle()` 递归函数，内部 fetch hitokoto API → 获取 quote 和 author → 生成文本 → 调用 `createTyped(id, [text], { ...options, loop: false, onLastStringBackspaced: shouldLoop ? () => { runHitokotoCycle() } : undefined })`。`shouldLoop` 取自原始 `options.loop`，确保只有用户配置 `loop: true` 时才循环获取新句子，`loop: false` 时只打字一次后停止。catch 中也加入了重试逻辑（3秒后递归重试）。","new_string":"**Bug 已发现：** 用户反馈副标题打印完后不会退格。根因分析如下：

Typed.js v2.0.12 的 `doneTyping` 方法中：
```js
this.arrayPos === this.strings.length - 1 && 
  (this.complete(), this.loop === false || this.curLoop === this.loopCount)
|| 
  (this.timeout = setTimeout(() => { s.backspace(t, e); }, this.backDelay));
```
- 当 `loop: false` 时，`this.loop === false` 为 `true` → `&&` 结果为 truthy → `||` 短路 → **不执行退格**
- 当 `loop: true` 时，`this.loop === false` 为 `false` → `&&` 结果为 falsy → `||` 执行 → **退格正常**

**修复方案（待实施）：** 将 `loop` 恢复为 `true` 以保证退格动画正常工作，同时在 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调中：
1. 通过 `instances.get(id)` 获取当前 Typed 实例
2. 覆盖 `instance.begin = function() {}` 阻止退格后自动重新打字旧文本
3. 调用 `runHitokotoCycle()` 获取新句子并创建新实例

对于 build 文件，需要解决变量名遮蔽问题：`initTyped(e)` 中的参数 `e` 遮蔽了外层 `const e = new Map`（instances Map）。需要将参数重命名（如 `_`）或在 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调中通过其他方式获取实例。

**当前状态：** 源码文件和 build 文件的修复待实施。","replace_all":false}

**Bug 已发现：** 用户反馈副标题打印完后不会退格。根因分析如下：

Typed.js v2.0.12 的 `doneTyping` 方法中：
```js
this.arrayPos === this.strings.length - 1 && 
  (this.complete(), this.loop === false || this.curLoop === this.loopCount)
|| 
  (this.timeout = setTimeout(() => { s.backspace(t, e); }, this.backDelay));
```
- 当 `loop: false` 时，`this.loop === false` 为 `true` → `&&` 结果为 truthy → `||` 短路 → **不执行退格**
- 当 `loop: true` 时，`this.loop === false` 为 `false` → `&&` 结果为 falsy → `||` 执行 → **退格正常**

**修复方案（待实施）：** 将 `loop` 恢复为 `true` 以保证退格动画正常工作，同时在 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调中：
1. 通过 `instances.get(id)` 获取当前 Typed 实例
2. 覆盖 `instance.begin = function() {}` 阻止退格后自动重新打字旧文本
3. 调用 `runHitokotoCycle()` 获取新句子并创建新实例

对于 build 文件，需要解决变量名遮蔽问题：`initTyped(e)` 中的参数 `e` 遮蔽了外层 `const e = new Map`（instances Map）。需要将参数重命名（如 `_`）或在 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调中通过其他方式获取实例。

**Bug: 第一次修改后副标题打印完不退格**

{"data":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"C:\Users\15198\.claude\projects\E--blog\memory\typed_hitokoto.md","content":"---
name: typed.js hitokoto cycling
description: How the subtitle typing animation and hitokoto fetching interact, and the change made to re-fetch on each cycle
type: project
---

The Redefine theme uses Typed.js v2.0.12 for the home banner subtitle typing animation, configured via `_config.redefine.yml` under `home_banner.subtitle`. When hitokoto is enabled, it fetches a random Chinese sentence from the hitokoto API. The typing plugin is at `source/js/plugins/typed.js`.

The modified behavior (2026-05-01): Instead of fetching one hitokoto and looping the same text, the code now uses Typed.js's `onLastStringBackspaced` callback to re-fetch a new hitokoto after each full type-and-backspace cycle. The `initTokens` Map mechanism ensures the cycle stops cleanly when the user navigates away (swup page transitions).

**Why:** The user wanted fresh hitokoto sentences after each typing animation cycle, not just on page refresh.

**How to apply:** If the theme is updated, these changes will be overwritten and need to be re-applied. The change is in the hitokoto-enabled branch of `initTyped()` — it wraps the fetch in a `runHitokotoCycle()` recursive function and overrides `loop: false` while hooking `onLastStringBackspaced` to trigger the next cycle.
","numLines":14,"startLine":1,"totalLines":14}}}

{"data":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"C:\Users\15198\.claude\projects\E--blog\memory\theme_js_architecture.md","content":"---
name: theme JS architecture
description: Redefine theme has dual source/build JS files; both must be updated when modifying theme JS
type: project
---

The Redefine theme serves JavaScript from `source/js/build/` by default (minified files). When `developer.enable` is set to `true` in `_config.redefine.yml`, it serves from `source/js/` instead (unminified source). The `renderJS` helper in `scripts/helpers/theme-helpers.js` controls this routing.

**Why:** When modifying theme JavaScript in node_modules, both the source file AND the corresponding build file must be updated. If only the source is changed, the changes won't take effect because the site loads the build version.

**How to apply:** Any time theme JS is modified, identify the source file (e.g., `source/js/plugins/typed.js`) and its build counterpart (e.g., `source/js/build/plugins/typed.js`), update both, then run `npx hexo generate` to verify the output.
","numLines":12,"startLine":1,"totalLines":12}}}

Their site uses the Utterances comment system. They have accounts on Luogu, Codeforces, AtCoder, and GitHub.

{"file_path":"C:\Users\15198\.claude\projects\E--blog\132f92d4-99ab-4265-b9b8-ff4486ad7df5\session-memory\summary.md","old_string":"**Bug 已发现：** 用户反馈副标题打印完后不会退格。根因分析如下：

Typed.js v2.0.12 的 `doneTyping` 方法中：
```js
this.arrayPos === this.strings.length - 1 && 
  (this.complete(), this.loop === false || this.curLoop === this.loopCount)
|| 
  (this.timeout = setTimeout(() => { s.backspace(t, e); }, this.backDelay));
```
- 当 `loop: false` 时，`this.loop === false` 为 `true` → `&&` 结果为 truthy → `||` 短路 → **不执行退格**
- 当 `loop: true` 时，`this.loop === false` 为 `false` → `&&` 结果为 falsy → `||` 执行 → **退格正常**

**修复方案（待实施）：** 将 `loop` 恢复为 `true` 以保证退格动画正常工作，同时在 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调中：
1. 通过 `instances.get(id)` 获取当前 Typed 实例
2. 覆盖 `instance.begin = function() {}` 阻止退格后自动重新打字旧文本
3. 调用 `runHitokotoCycle()` 获取新句子并创建新实例

对于 build 文件，需要解决变量名遮蔽问题：`initTyped(e)` 中的参数 `e` 遮蔽了外层 `const e = new Map`（instances Map）。需要将参数重命名（如 `_`）或在 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调中通过其他方式获取实例。

**当前状态：** 源码文件和 build 文件的修复待实施。","new_string":"**Bug 已分析，build 文件已自动修复（系统提示文件被修改）。源码文件仍需同步修复。**

**根因：** Typed.js v2.0.12 的 `doneTyping` 使用短路求值控制退格：
```js
(lastString && (complete(), loop===false || curLoop===loopCount)) || (startBackspace)
```
传入 `loop: false` → `loop===false` 为 `true` → `&&` 结果为 truthy → `||` 短路 → 退格被跳过。

**修复（已应用到 build 文件）：**
1. 参数重命名：`initTyped(e)` → `initTyped(_)` 避免遮蔽外层 `e`（instances Map）
2. `shouldLoop` 为 true 时：传入 `loop: true`（保证退格执行）+ `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调中：
   - `e.get(_)` 获取当前 Typed 实例（`e` 为外层 instances Map，`_` 为 id 参数）
   - `v.begin = function(){}` 覆盖 begin 为空函数，阻止退格后自动重新打字旧文本
   - `t.get(_)===a&&f()` 检查 token 后递归调用 `runHitokotoCycle()` 获取新句子
3. `shouldLoop` 为 false 时：传入 `loop: false`（无退格，仅打字一次后停止），不加回调

**源码文件待同步修改。**","replace_all":false}

# Session Title
_A short and distinctive 5-10 word descriptive title for the session. Super info dense, no filler_
Hexo Redefine 副标题打字动画后重新获取一言

# Current State
_What is actively being worked on right now? Pending tasks not yet completed. Immediate next steps._
**Bug 已发现：** 用户反馈副标题打印完后不会退格。根因分析如下：

Typed.js v2.0.12 的 `doneTyping` 方法中：
```js
this.arrayPos === this.strings.length - 1 && 
  (this.complete(), this.loop === false || this.curLoop === this.loopCount)
|| 
  (this.timeout = setTimeout(() => { s.backspace(t, e); }, this.backDelay));
```
- 当 `loop: false` 时，`this.loop === false` 为 `true` → `&&` 结果为 truthy → `||` 短路 → **不执行退格**
- 当 `loop: true` 时，`this.loop === false` 为 `false` → `&&` 结果为 falsy → `||` 执行 → **退格正常**

**修复方案（待实施）：** 将 `loop` 恢复为 `true` 以保证退格动画正常工作，同时在 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调中：
1. 通过 `instances.get(id)` 获取当前 Typed 实例
2. 覆盖 `instance.begin = function() {}` 阻止退格后自动重新打字旧文本
3. 调用 `runHitokotoCycle()` 获取新句子并创建新实例

对于 build 文件，需要解决变量名遮蔽问题：`initTyped(e)` 中的参数 `e` 遮蔽了外层 `const e = new Map`（instances Map）。需要将参数重命名（如 `_`）或在 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调中通过其他方式获取实例。

**当前状态：** 源码文件和 build 文件的修复待实施。

# Task specification
_What did the user ask to build? Any design decisions or other explanatory context_
用户的个人博客使用 Hexo + GitHub Pages，主题为 Redefine。该主题有一个副标题自动获取一言(hitokoto)的功能，但目前只有刷新页面才会重新获取新的一言。用户希望在副标题打字动画的退格(backspace)阶段完成后，自动获取一句新的一言句子，实现每轮打字动画循环展示不同的句子。

# Files and Functions
_What are the important files? In short, what do they contain and why are they relevant?_
**核心修改文件（源码）：**
- `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/plugins/typed.js` — typing 插件，包含 hitokoto fetch 和 Typed 实例创建逻辑。**需要修改此文件。**
- `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/build/plugins/typed.js` — 构建后的 minified 版本，**需同步修改。**

**关键函数和逻辑（typed.js 源码）：**
- `createTyped(id, strings, options)` — 创建 Typed 实例的封装函数，会先 destroy 旧实例再创建新实例
- `destroyInstance(id)` — 销毁 Typed 实例并清空 DOM 元素
- `initTyped(id)` — 入口函数，判断 hitokoto 是否启用：
  - **hitokoto 启用时 (L100-129)：** fetch API → 获取 quote 和 author → 拼接文本 → 调用 createTyped。**问题：只 fetch 一次，loop 只是重复相同文本。**
  - **hitokoto 未启用时 (L132-138)：** 使用配置中的固定 subtitle 文本数组
- `config` (L65-73) — 从 `theme.home_banner.subtitle` 导出配置参数

**Typed.js 实例创建参数 (L49-57)：**
```js
new window.Typed(`#${id}`, {
  strings,           // 要打字的字符串数组
  typeSpeed,         // 打字速度
  smartBackspace,    // 智能退格
  backSpeed,         // 退格速度
  backDelay,         // 退格延迟
  loop,              // 是否循环
  startDelay,        // 开始延迟
});
```

**Typed.js 关键回调（未在当前代码中使用，修改时可用）：**
- `onLastStringBackspaced(self)` — 所有字符串退格完成后触发，**这是注入重新获取 hitokoto 逻辑的最佳时机**
- `onComplete(self)` — 打字完成后触发
- `onDestroy(self)` — 实例销毁后触发

**调用链：**
- `main.js` L152-167 → 检查 `location.pathname === config.root` → 调用 `initTyped("subtitle")`
- `main.js` L83-86 → 页面刷新事件 `redefine:page:refresh` 监听器 → 触发 `initPage()` → 重新调用 `initTyped("subtitle")`

**配置文件 `_config.redefine.yml` (L133-144)：**
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.enable: true`
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.show_author: true`
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.api: https://v1.hitokoto.cn`
- `home_banner.subtitle.typing_speed: 100` / `backing_speed: 80` / `starting_delay: 500

{"file_path":"C:\Users\15198\.claude\projects\E--blog\memory\typed_hitokoto.md","content":"---
name: typed.js hitokoto cycling
description: How the subtitle typing animation and hitokoto fetching interact, and the change made to re-fetch on each cycle
type: project
---

The Redefine theme uses Typed.js v2.0.12 for the home banner subtitle typing animation, configured via `_config.redefine.yml` under `home_banner.subtitle`. When hitokoto is enabled, it fetches a random Chinese sentence from the hitokoto API. The typing plugin is at `source/js/plugins/typed.js`.

The modified behavior (2026-05-01): Instead of fetching one hitokoto and looping the same text, the code now fetches a new hitokoto after each full type-and-backspace cycle. The implementation uses `loop: true` (required for Typed.js to run the backspace animation — setting `loop: false` skips backspace entirely due to a short-circuit in Typed.js's `doneTyping` method). In the `onLastStringBackspaced` callback, the old instance's `begin` method is overridden to a no-op (preventing it from re-typing the old text), then `runHitokotoCycle()` fetches a fresh sentence and creates a new Typed instance. When `loop: false` in config, the original behavior (type once, no backspace, no cycle) is preserved. The `initTokens` Map mechanism ensures the cycle stops cleanly when the user navigates away (swup page transitions).

**Why:** The user wanted fresh hitokoto sentences after each typing animation cycle, not just on page refresh. The first attempt set `loop: false` which broke backspacing — a user-reported bug.

**How to apply:** If the theme is updated, these changes will be overwritten and need to be re-applied. The change is in the hitokoto-enabled branch of `initTyped()` — a `runHitokotoCycle()` recursive function wraps the fetch, and `cycleOptions` diverges based on `shouldLoop`: when true, `loop: true` + `onLastStringBackspaced` that overrides `instance.begin` and recurses; when false, `loop: false` with no callback.
"}

messageText: Now update the build file. The parameter `e` in `initTyped` shadows the outer `e` (instances Map), so I need to rename the parameter to access the instances Map from the callback.

The issue is that I set `loop: false`, but Typed.js only backspaces when `loop: true`. With `loop: false`, it types and then stops without any backspace animation.

Looking at Typed.js's source, the `doneTyping` method explicitly checks `this.loop === false` to skip backspacing. So I need `loop: true` for the backspace to happen, and then use `onLastStringBackspaced` to prevent it from re-typing the old text.

Let me fix both files.

{"file_path":"C:\Users\15198\.claude\projects\E--blog\memory\theme_js_architecture.md","content":"---
name: theme JS architecture
description: Redefine theme has dual source/build JS files; both must be updated when modifying theme JS
type: project
---

The Redefine theme serves JavaScript from `source/js/build/` by default (minified files). When `developer.enable` is set to `true` in `_config.redefine.yml`, it serves from `source/js/` instead (unminified source). The `renderJS` helper in `scripts/helpers/theme-helpers.js` controls this routing.

**Why:** When modifying theme JavaScript in node_modules, both the source file AND the corresponding build file must be updated. If only the source is changed, the changes won't take effect because the site loads the build version.

**Minification pitfalls:** The build file uses single-letter variable names. The outer-scope `const e=new Map` (instances Map) is shadowed by `initTyped(e)` where the parameter `e` is the element id. Adding code inside `initTyped` that needs to access the outer instances Map requires renaming the parameter (e.g., to `_`) to de-conflict — otherwise `instances.get(id)` cannot be expressed since both variables are named `e`.

**How to apply:** Any time theme JS is modified, identify the source file (e.g., `source/js/plugins/typed.js`) and its build counterpart (e.g., `source/js/build/plugins/typed.js`), update both, then run `npx hexo generate` to verify the output in `public/js/`. When editing the minified build, trace all single-letter variable references carefully to avoid shadowing bugs.
"}

{"file_path":"C:\Users\15198\.claude\projects\E--blog\132f92d4-99ab-4265-b9b8-ff4486ad7df5\session-memory\summary.md","old_string":"**Bug 已分析，build 文件已自动修复（系统提示文件被修改）。源码文件仍需同步修复。**

**根因：** Typed.js v2.0.12 的 `doneTyping` 使用短路求值控制退格：
```js
(lastString && (complete(), loop===false || curLoop===loopCount)) || (startBackspace)
```
传入 `loop: false` → `loop===false` 为 `true` → `&&` 结果为 truthy → `||` 短路 → 退格被跳过。

**修复（已应用到 build 文件）：**
1. 参数重命名：`initTyped(e)` → `initTyped(_)` 避免遮蔽外层 `e`（instances Map）
2. `shouldLoop` 为 true 时：传入 `loop: true`（保证退格执行）+ `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调中：
   - `e.get(_)` 获取当前 Typed 实例（`e` 为外层 instances Map，`_` 为 id 参数）
   - `v.begin = function(){}` 覆盖 begin 为空函数，阻止退格后自动重新打字旧文本
   - `t.get(_)===a&&f()` 检查 token 后递归调用 `runHitokotoCycle()` 获取新句子
3. `shouldLoop` 为 false 时：传入 `loop: false`（无退格，仅打字一次后停止），不加回调

**源码文件待同步修改。**","new_string":"**修复已完成（源码 + build 文件均已修改并构建成功）。**

**根因：** Typed.js v2.0.12 的 `doneTyping` 使用短路求值控制退格：
```js
(lastString && (complete(), loop===false || curLoop===loopCount)) || (startBackspace)
```
传入 `loop: false` → `loop===false` 为 `true` → `&&` 结果为 truthy → `||` 短路 → 退格被跳过。

**最终修复方案（源码 typed.js L100-157）：**
1. 提取 `shouldLoop = options.loop` 保存原始 loop 配置
2. 创建 `runHitokotoCycle()` 递归函数包裹 fetch 逻辑
3. 根据 `shouldLoop` 构造不同的 cycleOptions：
   - `shouldLoop=true`：`loop: true`（保证退格执行）+ `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调：
     - `instances.get(id)` 获取当前 Typed 实例
     - `instance.begin = function(){}` 覆盖 begin 为空函数，阻止退格后自动重新打字旧文本
     - `initTokens.get(id) === currentToken` 检查通过后递归调用 `runHitokotoCycle()` 获取新句子
   - `shouldLoop=false`：`loop: false`（无退格，仅打字一次后停止），不加回调
4. catch 中：`shouldLoop` 为 true 时 3 秒后重试

**Build 文件修复（typed.js minified）：**
- 参数重命名：`initTyped(e)` → `initTyped(_)` 避免遮蔽外层 `e`（instances Map）
- 使用 `const h=l.loop` 和 `const f=()=>{...}` 对应源码的 `shouldLoop` 和 `runHitokotoCycle`
- 回调中 `const v=e.get(_)` 获取实例（`e`=外层 instances Map，`_`=id），`v.begin=function(){}` 阻止重打
- `npx hexo generate` 构建成功，public 目录输出验证通过","replace_all":false}

# Session Title
_A short and distinctive 5-10 word descriptive title for the session. Super info dense, no filler_
Hexo Redefine 副标题打字动画后重新获取一言

# Current State
_What is actively being worked on right now? Pending tasks not yet completed. Immediate next steps._
**Bug 已分析，build 文件已自动修复（系统提示文件被修改）。源码文件仍需同步修复。**

**根因：** Typed.js v2.0.12 的 `doneTyping` 使用短路求值控制退格：
```js
(lastString && (complete(), loop===false || curLoop===loopCount)) || (startBackspace)
```
传入 `loop: false` → `loop===false` 为 `true` → `&&` 结果为 truthy → `||` 短路 → 退格被跳过。

**修复（已应用到 build 文件）：**
1. 参数重命名：`initTyped(e)` → `initTyped(_)` 避免遮蔽外层 `e`（instances Map）
2. `shouldLoop` 为 true 时：传入 `loop: true`（保证退格执行）+ `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调中：
   - `e.get(_)` 获取当前 Typed 实例（`e` 为外层 instances Map，`_` 为 id 参数）
   - `v.begin = function(){}` 覆盖 begin 为空函数，阻止退格后自动重新打字旧文本
   - `t.get(_)===a&&f()` 检查 token 后递归调用 `runHitokotoCycle()` 获取新句子
3. `shouldLoop` 为 false 时：传入 `loop: false`（无退格，仅打字一次后停止），不加回调

**源码文件待同步修改。**

# Task specification
_What did the user ask to build? Any design decisions or other explanatory context_
用户的个人博客使用 Hexo + GitHub Pages，主题为 Redefine。该主题有一个副标题自动获取一言(hitokoto)的功能，但目前只有刷新页面才会重新获取新的一言。用户希望在副标题打字动画的退格(backspace)阶段完成后，自动获取一句新的一言句子，实现每轮打字动画循环展示不同的句子。

# Files and Functions
_What are the important files? In short, what do they contain and why are they relevant?_
**核心修改文件（源码）：**
- `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/plugins/typed.js` — typing 插件，包含 hitokoto fetch 和 Typed 实例创建逻辑。**需要修改此文件。**
- `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/build/plugins/typed.js` — 构建后的 minified 版本，**需同步修改。**

**关键函数和逻辑（typed.js 源码）：**
- `createTyped(id, strings, options)` — 创建 Typed 实例的封装函数，会先 destroy 旧实例再创建新实例
- `destroyInstance(id)` — 销毁 Typed 实例并清空 DOM 元素
- `initTyped(id)` — 入口函数，判断 hitokoto 是否启用：
  - **hitokoto 启用时 (L100-129)：** fetch API → 获取 quote 和 author → 拼接文本 → 调用 createTyped。**问题：只 fetch 一次，loop 只是重复相同文本。**
  - **hitokoto 未启用时 (L132-138)：** 使用配置中的固定 subtitle 文本数组
- `config` (L65-73) — 从 `theme.home_banner.subtitle` 导出配置参数

**Typed.js 实例创建参数 (L49-57)：**
```js
new window.Typed(`#${id}`, {
  strings,           // 要打字的字符串数组
  typeSpeed,         // 打字速度
  smartBackspace,    // 智能退格
  backSpeed,         // 退格速度
  backDelay,         // 退格延迟
  loop,              // 是否循环
  startDelay,        // 开始延迟
});
```

**Typed.js 关键回调（未在当前代码中使用，修改时可用）：**
- `onLastStringBackspaced(self)` — 所有字符串退格完成后触发，**这是注入重新获取 hitokoto 逻辑的最佳时机**
- `onComplete(self)` — 打字完成后触发
- `onDestroy(self)` — 实例销毁后触发

**调用链：**
- `main.js` L152-167 → 检查 `location.pathname === config.root` → 调用 `initTyped("subtitle")`
- `main.js` L83-86 → 页面刷新事件 `redefine:page:refresh` 监听器 → 触发 `initPage()` → 重新调用 `initTyped("subtitle")`

**配置文件 `_config.redefine.yml` (L133-144)：**
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.enable: true`
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.show_author: true`
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.api: https://v1.hito

messageText: The build output is correct. Let me also quickly verify the source file:
Build succeeded. Let me verify the generated output.

The fix is applied and the site rebuilds cleanly.

**Root cause:** In Typed.js v2.0.12, the `doneTyping` method has this logic:

```
lastString && (complete(), loop===false || curLoop===loopCount)  ||  backspace()
```

When `loop: false`, the expression `loop === false` is `true`, which short-circuits the `||` operator and **skips the backspace entirely**. The backspace animation only runs when `loop: true`.

**What I changed (both source and build files):**

1. **Loop is now `true`** so the backspace animation runs after typing completes
2. **`onLastStringBackspaced` callback** fires right after the text is fully backspaced — it does two things:
   - Overrides `instance.begin = function(){}` on the old Typed instance to prevent it from re-typing the old sentence (Typed.js would otherwise call `begin()` immediately after the callback)
   - Calls `runHitokotoCycle()` to fetch a fresh hitokoto and start a brand new type+backspace cycle

The flow is now: fetch → type out → backspace → callback blocks re-typing → fetch new → type out → backspace → ...
退格是正常了，但是一言还是要刷新网页才会刷新啊，没有达到我想要的效果。而且副标题要过几秒才出现。不是和网页里的内容一起出现的
Good catch. There are actually **two** bugs. Let me investigate.

**修复已完成（源码 + build 文件均已修改并构建成功）。**

**根因：** Typed.js v2.0.12 的 `doneTyping` 使用短路求值控制退格：
```js
(lastString && (complete(), loop===false || curLoop===loopCount)) || (startBackspace)
```
传入 `loop: false` → `loop===false` 为 `true` → `&&` 结果为 truthy → `||` 短路 → 退格被跳过。

**最终修复方案（源码 typed.js L100-157）：**
1. 提取 `shouldLoop = options.loop` 保存原始 loop 配置
2. 创建 `runHitokotoCycle()` 递归函数包裹 fetch 逻辑
3. 根据 `shouldLoop` 构造不同的 cycleOptions：
   - `shouldLoop=true`：`loop: true`（保证退格执行）+ `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调：
     - `instances.get(id)` 获取当前 Typed 实例
     - `instance.begin = function(){}` 覆盖 begin 为空函数，阻止退格后自动重新打字旧文本
     - `initTokens.get(id) === currentToken` 检查通过后递归调用 `runHitokotoCycle()` 获取新句子
   - `shouldLoop=false`：`loop: false`（无退格，仅打字一次后停止），不加回调
4. catch 中：`shouldLoop` 为 true 时 3 秒后重试

**Build 文件修复（typed.js minified）：**
- 参数重命名：`initTyped(e)` → `initTyped(_)` 避免遮蔽外层 `e`（instances Map）
- 使用 `const h=l.loop` 和 `const f=()=>{...}` 对应源码的 `shouldLoop` 和 `runHitokotoCycle`
- 回调中 `const v=e.get(_)` 获取实例（`e`=外层 instances Map，`_`=id），`v.begin=function(){}` 阻止重打
- `npx hexo generate` 构建成功，public 目录输出验证通过","new_string":"# Current State

```js
const instance = new window.Typed(`#${id}`, {
    strings,
    typeSpeed: options.typeSpeed,
    smartBackspace: options.smartBackspace,
    backSpeed: options.backSpeed,
    backDelay: options.backDelay,
    loop: options.loop,
    startDelay: options.startDelay,
    // ❌ onLastStringBackspaced 等回调未转发！
});
```
在 `cycleOptions` 中设置的 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调被 `createTyped` 静默丢弃，从未注册到 Typed.js。因此退格完成后 Typed.js 走内置 loop 逻辑重打旧文本，永远不会触发 fetch 新一言。

**正在进行中的修复：**
- 源码：将 `createTyped` 的对象字面量改为 `{ ...options, strings }`，自动转发所有回调选项
- Build 文件：将 `{strings:o,typeSpeed:r.typeSpeed,...}` 改为 `{...r,strings:o}`

{"data":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"C:\Users\15198\.claude\projects\E--blog\memory\typed_hitokoto.md","content":"---
name: typed.js hitokoto cycling
description: How the subtitle typing animation and hitokoto fetching interact, and the change made to re-fetch on each cycle
type: project
---

The Redefine theme uses Typed.js v2.0.12 for the home banner subtitle typing animation, configured via `_config.redefine.yml` under `home_banner.subtitle`. When hitokoto is enabled, it fetches a random Chinese sentence from the hitokoto API. The typing plugin is at `source/js/plugins/typed.js`.

The modified behavior (2026-05-01): Instead of fetching one hitokoto and looping the same text, the code now fetches a new hitokoto after each full type-and-backspace cycle. The implementation uses `loop: true` (required for Typed.js to run the backspace animation — setting `loop: false` skips backspace entirely due to a short-circuit in Typed.js's `doneTyping` method). In the `onLastStringBackspaced` callback, the old instance's `begin` method is overridden to a no-op (preventing it from re-typing the old text), then `runHitokotoCycle()` fetches a fresh sentence and creates a new Typed instance. When `loop: false` in config, the original behavior (type once, no backspace, no cycle) is preserved. The `initTokens` Map mechanism ensures the cycle stops cleanly when the user navigates away (swup page transitions).

**Why:** The user wanted fresh hitokoto sentences after each typing animation cycle, not just on page refresh. The first attempt set `loop: false` which broke backspacing — a user-reported bug.

**How to apply:** If the theme is updated, these changes will be overwritten and need to be re-applied. The change is in the hitokoto-enabled branch of `initTyped()` — a `runHitokotoCycle()` recursive function wraps the fetch, and `cycleOptions` diverges based on `shouldLoop`: when true, `loop: true` + `onLastStringBackspaced` that overrides `instance.begin` and recurses; when false, `loop: false` with no callback.
","numLines":14,"startLine":1,"totalLines":14}}}

{"data":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"C:\Users\15198\.claude\projects\E--blog\memory\theme_js_architecture.md","content":"---
name: theme JS architecture
description: Redefine theme has dual source/build JS files; both must be updated when modifying theme JS
type: project
---

The Redefine theme serves JavaScript from `source/js/build/` by default (minified files). When `developer.enable` is set to `true` in `_config.redefine.yml`, it serves from `source/js/` instead (unminified source). The `renderJS` helper in `scripts/helpers/theme-helpers.js` controls this routing.

**Why:** When modifying theme JavaScript in node_modules, both the source file AND the corresponding build file must be updated. If only the source is changed, the changes won't take effect because the site loads the build version.

**Minification pitfalls:** The build file uses single-letter variable names. The outer-scope `const e=new Map` (instances Map) is shadowed by `initTyped(e)` where the parameter `e` is the element id. Adding code inside `initTyped` that needs to access the outer instances Map requires renaming the parameter (e.g., to `_`) to de-conflict — otherwise `instances.get(id)` cannot be expressed since both variables are named `e`.

**How to apply:** Any time theme JS is modified, identify the source file (e.g., `source/js/plugins/typed.js`) and its build counterpart (e.g., `source/js/build/plugins/typed.js`), update both, then run `npx hexo generate` to verify the output in `public/js/`. When editing the minified build, trace all single-letter variable references carefully to avoid shadowing bugs.
","numLines":14,"startLine":1,"totalLines":14}}}

{"file_path":"C:\Users\15198\.claude\projects\E--blog\memory\typed_hitokoto.md","old_string":"The modified behavior (2026-05-01): Instead of fetching one hitokoto and looping the same text, the code now fetches a new hitokoto after each full type-and-backspace cycle. The implementation uses `loop: true` (required for Typed.js to run the backspace animation — setting `loop: false` skips backspace entirely due to a short-circuit in Typed.js's `doneTyping` method). In the `onLastStringBackspaced` callback, the old instance's `begin` method is overridden to a no-op (preventing it from re-typing the old text), then `runHitokotoCycle()` fetches a fresh sentence and creates a new Typed instance. When `loop: false` in config, the original behavior (type once, no backspace, no cycle) is preserved. The `initTokens` Map mechanism ensures the cycle stops cleanly when the user navigates away (swup page transitions).

**Why:** The user wanted fresh hitokoto sentences after each typing animation cycle, not just on page refresh. The first attempt set `loop: false` which broke backspacing — a user-reported bug.

**How to apply:** If the theme is updated, these changes will be overwritten and need to be re-applied. The change is in the hitokoto-enabled branch of `initTyped()` — a `runHitokotoCycle()` recursive function wraps the fetch, and `cycleOptions` diverges based on `shouldLoop`: when true, `loop: true` + `onLastStringBackspaced` that overrides `instance.begin` and recurses; when false, `loop: false` with no callback.","new_string":"The modified behavior (2026-05-01): Instead of fetching one hitokoto and looping the same text, the code now fetches a new hitokoto after each full type-and-backspace cycle.

**Implementation details:**

- Uses `loop: true` (required for Typed.js v2.0.12 to run the backspace animation — setting `loop: false` skips backspace entirely due to a short-circuit in Typed.js's `doneTyping` method: `lastString && (complete(), loop===false || curLoop===loopCount) || backspace()`).
- In the `onLastStringBackspaced` callback, the old instance's `begin` method is overridden to a no-op (preventing it from re-typing the old text), then `runHitokotoCycle()` fetches a fresh sentence and creates a new Typed instance. This is necessary because Typed.js calls `begin()` synchronously right after `onLastStringBackspaced()` — without the override, the old text would start re-typing before the new fetch completes.
- When `loop: false` in config, the original behavior (type once, no backspace, no cycle) is preserved via a separate `cycleOptions` branch with `loop: false` and no callback.
- The `initTokens` Map mechanism ensures the cycle stops cleanly when the user navigates away (swup page transitions).
- The `createTyped()` helper was also modified: it originally only forwarded 6 specific properties (`typeSpeed`, `smartBackspace`, `backSpeed`, `backDelay`, `loop`, `startDelay`) to the Typed.js constructor, silently dropping all callback options. Changed to `{...options, strings}` to pass all properties through.

**Bugs encountered and fixed:**

1. First attempt used `loop: false` → backspace animation never ran. Fix: use `loop: true`.
2. Second attempt correctly set `loop: true` and `onLastStringBackspaced`, but the callback never fired because `createTyped()` wasn't forwarding callback options to Typed.js. Fix: spread all options via `{...options, strings}`.

**Why:** The user wanted fresh hitokoto sentences after each typing animation cycle, not just on page refresh. Two rounds of user-reported bugs led to the final working version.

**How to apply:** If the theme is updated, these changes will be overwritten and need to be re-applied. Three locations were changed in both source and build files: (1) the `createTyped` helper to spread options, (2) the hitokoto-enabled branch of `initTyped()` with a `runHitokotoCycle()` recursive function and dual `cycleOptions` paths, and (3) in the build file only, the `initTyped` parameter renamed from `e` to `_` to resolve variable shadowing of the outer instances Map.","replace_all":false}

{"file_path":"C:\Users\15198\.claude\projects\E--blog\132f92d4-99ab-4265-b9b8-ff4486ad7df5\session-memory\summary.md","old_string":"# Errors & Corrections
**Bug: 第一次修改后副标题打印完不退格**
- 根因：`createTyped` 传入了 `loop: false`，Typed.js 在 `doneTyping` 中检查 `this.loop === false` 为 `true` 时跳过退格逻辑，直接停止。
- 修复方向：必须使用 `loop: true` 才能触发退格。退格完成后 `onLastStringBackspaced` 触发 → 覆盖 `instance.begin = function(){}` 阻止重新打旧文本 → fetch 新 hitokoto → 创建新实例。
- Build 文件的附加难点：`initTyped(e)` 的参数 `e` 遮蔽了外层 `const e = new Map`（instances Map），在回调中无法直接 `instances.get(id)` 获取实例。需重命名参数避免遮蔽。
- **先前的错误做法（不可重复）：** 在 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调内同步调用 `createTyped` 来销毁旧实例并创建新实例。这会导致竞态条件——`createTyped` 内部 `destroy()` → `reset(false)` 清除 timeout 并重置，但随后原始 `backspace()` 方法中的 `s.begin()` 仍会执行，两个实例同时操作同一 DOM 元素。","new_string":"# Errors & Corrections
**Bug 1: 副标题打印完不退格**
- 根因：`createTyped` 传入了 `loop: false`，Typed.js 在 `doneTyping` 中检查 `this.loop === false` 为 `true` 时`||`短路跳过退格逻辑，直接停止。
- 修复：使用 `loop: true` 触发退格。退格完成后 `onLastStringBackspaced` 触发 → 覆盖 `instance.begin = function(){}` 阻止重新打旧文本 → fetch 新 hitokoto → 创建新实例。
- Build 文件的附加难点：`initTyped(e)` 的参数 `e` 遮蔽了外层 `const e = new Map`（instances Map），在回调中无法直接 `instances.get(id)` 获取实例。需重命名参数 `e` → `_` 避免遮蔽。

**Bug 2（关键）：createTyped 不转发回调 — onLastStringBackspaced 被静默丢弃**
- 根因：`createTyped` 函数（源码 L49-57）创建 Typed 实例时手动列出 6 个属性（typeSpeed, smartBackspace, backSpeed, backDelay, loop, startDelay），**没有传递 `onLastStringBackspaced`、`onStringTyped`、`preStringTyped` 等任何回调属性**。
- 后果：在 `cycleOptions` 中精心设置的 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调被 `createTyped` 完全忽略。Typed.js 实例从未收到该回调，退格后走内置 loop 逻辑重打旧文本。一言永远不会自动刷新。
- 副作用：因为 `createTyped` 丢掉了所有非 6 属性之外的内容，任何通过 options 传入的回调都会无声失败。
- 修复：源码 `{ strings, typeSpeed:..., ... }` → `{ ...options, strings }`；Build `{strings:o,typeSpeed:r.typeSpeed,...}` → `{...r,strings:o}`
- **关键教训：不要手动列举对象的属性来"筛选"传递——用 spread 操作符 `...options` 转发所有属性，Typed.js 自己会忽略不认识的属性。**

**Bug 3：副标题过几秒才出现**
- 原因：hitokoto 路径需要先 fetch API（网络延迟 200-500ms）+ `startDelay: 500ms`，导致总计约 700-1000ms 延迟。这是 hitokoto 功能的固有特性（需要先获取数据），不属于本次修改引入的 bug。
- 可能的优化方向（未实施）：首轮使用 `startDelay: 0`；预 fetch；显示 placeholder。

**先前的错误做法（不可重复）：**
- 在 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调内同步调用 `createTyped` 来销毁旧实例并创建新实例。这会导致竞态条件——`createTyped` 内部 `destroy()` → `reset(false)` 清除 timeout 并重置，但随后原始 `backspace()` 方法中的 `s.begin()` 仍会执行，两个实例同时操作同一 DOM 元素。
- 正确做法：仅覆盖 `instance.begin` 阻止旧实例重打，异步 fetch 后在 `runHitokotoCycle()` 中通过 `createTyped` 创建新实例（此时旧实例的同步调用栈已完全退出）。","replace_all":false}

# Session Title
_A short and distinctive 5-10 word descriptive title for the session. Super info dense, no filler_
Hexo Redefine 副标题打字动画后重新获取一言

# Current State
_What is actively being worked on right now? Pending tasks not yet completed. Immediate next steps._
**第二次修复后仍有 bug：副标题退格正常了，但一言不会自动刷新（仍需刷新网页），且副标题过几秒才出现。**

**新发现的根因（createTyped 未转发回调）：**
`createTyped` 函数（源码 L49-57）创建 Typed 实例时只传递了 6 个特定属性，**完全忽略 `onLastStringBackspaced` 及其他所有回调选项**：
```js
const instance = new window.Typed(`#${id}`, {
    strings,
    typeSpeed: options.typeSpeed,
    smartBackspace: options.smartBackspace,
    backSpeed: options.backSpeed,
    backDelay: options.backDelay,
    loop: options.loop,
    startDelay: options.startDelay,
    // ❌ onLastStringBackspaced 等回调未转发！
});
```
在 `cycleOptions` 中设置的 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调被 `createTyped` 静默丢弃，从未注册到 Typed.js。因此退格完成后 Typed.js 走内置 loop 逻辑重打旧文本，永远不会触发 fetch 新一言。

**正在进行中的修复：**
- 源码：将 `createTyped` 的对象字面量改为 `{ ...options, strings }`，自动转发所有回调选项
- Build 文件：将 `{strings:o,typeSpeed:r.typeSpeed,...}` 改为 `{...r,strings:o}`
- 源码 edit 已执行，build 文件 edit 待执行，然后重新 `hexo generate` 验证

# Task specification
_What did the user ask to build? Any design decisions or other explanatory context_
用户的个人博客使用 Hexo + GitHub Pages，主题为 Redefine。该主题有一个副标题自动获取一言(hitokoto)的功能，但目前只有刷新页面才会重新获取新的一言。用户希望在副标题打字动画的退格(backspace)阶段完成后，自动获取一句新的一言句子，实现每轮打字动画循环展示不同的句子。

# Files and Functions
_What are the important files? In short, what do they contain and why are they relevant?_
**核心修改文件（源码）：**
- `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/plugins/typed.js` — typing 插件，包含 hitokoto fetch 和 Typed 实例创建逻辑。**需要修改此文件。**
- `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/build/plugins/typed.js` — 构建后的 minified 版本，**需同步修改。**

**关键函数和逻辑（typed.js 源码）：**
- `createTyped(id, strings, options)` — 创建 Typed 实例的封装函数，会先 destroy 旧实例再创建新实例
- `destroyInstance(id)` — 销毁 Typed 实例并清空 DOM 元素
- `initTyped(id)` — 入口函数，判断 hitokoto 是否启用：
  - **hitokoto 启用时 (L100-129)：** fetch API → 获取 quote 和 author → 拼接文本 → 调用 createTyped。**问题：只 fetch 一次，loop 只是重复相同文本。**
  - **hitokoto 未启用时 (L132-138)：** 使用配置中的固定 subtitle 文本数组
- `config` (L65-73) — 从 `theme.home_banner.subtitle` 导出配置参数

**Typed.js 实例创建参数 (L49-57)：**
```js
new window.Typed(`#${id}`, {
  strings,           // 要打字的字符串数组
  typeSpeed,         // 打字速度
  smartBackspace,    // 智能退格
  backSpeed,         // 退格速度
  backDelay,         // 退格延迟
  loop,              // 是否循环
  startDelay,        // 开始延迟
});
```

name: theme JS architecture
description: Redefine theme has dual source/build JS files; both must be updated when modifying theme JS
type: project
---

The Redefine theme serves JavaScript from `source/js/build/` by default (minified files). When `developer.enable` is set to `true` in `_config.redefine.yml`, it serves from `source/js/` instead (unminified source). The `renderJS` helper in `scripts/helpers/theme-helpers.js` controls this routing.

**Why:** When modifying theme JavaScript in node_modules, both the source file AND the corresponding build file must be updated. If only the source is changed, the changes won't take effect because the site loads the build version.

**Minification pitfalls:** The build file uses single-letter variable names. The outer-scope `const e=new Map` (instances Map) is shadowed by `initTyped(e)` where the parameter `e` is the element id. Adding code inside `initTyped` that needs to access the outer instances Map requires renaming the parameter (e.g., to `_`) to de-conflict — otherwise `instances.get(id)` cannot be expressed since both variables are named `e`.

**How to apply:** Any time theme JS is modified, identify the source file (e.g., `source/js/plugins/typed.js`) and its build counterpart (e.g., `source/js/build/plugins/typed.js`), update both, then run `npx hexo generate` to verify the output in `public/js/`. When editing the minified build, trace all single-letter variable references carefully to avoid shadowing bugs.

Now rebuild and verify.

Found it. The `createTyped` function **only passes 6 specific properties** to Typed.js (lines 49-57). It completely ignores `onLastStringBackspaced` and all other callback options. So my callback was never actually registered with Typed.js — it was silently dropped.
Let me verify the generated output:
Let me verify the complete source file one final time:

toolInput: {"command":"cd E:/blog && npx hexo generate 2>&1","description":"Rebuild the Hexo static site","timeout":120000}

{"file_path":"C:\Users\15198\.claude\projects\E--blog\132f92d4-99ab-4265-b9b8-ff4486ad7df5\session-memory\summary.md","old_string":"# Current State
_What is actively being worked on right now? Pending tasks not yet completed. Immediate next steps._
**第二次修复后仍有 bug：副标题退格正常了，但一言不会自动刷新（仍需刷新网页），且副标题过几秒才出现。**

**新发现的根因（createTyped 未转发回调）：**
`createTyped` 函数（源码 L49-57）创建 Typed 实例时只传递了 6 个特定属性，**完全忽略 `onLastStringBackspaced` 及其他所有回调选项**：
```js
const instance = new window.Typed(`#${id}`, {
    strings,
    typeSpeed: options.typeSpeed,
    smartBackspace: options.smartBackspace,
    backSpeed: options.backSpeed,
    backDelay: options.backDelay,
    loop: options.loop,
    startDelay: options.startDelay,
    // ❌ onLastStringBackspaced 等回调未转发！
});
```
在 `cycleOptions` 中设置的 `onLastStringBackspaced` 回调被 `createTyped` 静默丢弃，从未注册到 Typed.js。因此退格完成后 Typed.js 走内置 loop 逻辑重打旧文本，永远不会触发 fetch 新一言。

**正在进行中的修复：**
- 源码：将 `createTyped` 的对象字面量改为 `{ ...options, strings }`，自动转发所有回调选项
- Build 文件：将 `{strings:o,typeSpeed:r.typeSpeed,...}` 改为 `{...r,strings:o}`
- 源码 edit 已执行，build 文件 edit 待执行，然后重新 `hexo generate` 验证","new_string":"# Current State

2. **Build `typed.js`：** `{strings:o,typeSpeed:r.typeSpeed,...}` 改为 `{...r,strings:o}`

**仍需用户实际部署验证**：修改在 node_modules 中，执行 `hexo deploy`（或 `hexo generate` + 推送 public 目录到 GitHub Pages）后才能在线上生效。用户需确认：（1）退格后自动获取新一言、（2）循环持续进行。

**副标题延迟出现（几秒才显示）是 hitokoto 固有特性**：需要先 fetch API（网络延迟 200-500ms）+ `startDelay: 500ms`。原代码也有相同延迟，非本次修改引入。若需优化可考虑首轮 startDelay=0 或预 fetch。","replace_all":false}

`createTyped` 函数（源码 L49-57）创建 Typed 实例时只传递了 6 个特定属性，**完全忽略 `onLastStringBackspaced` 及其他所有回调选项**：
```js
const instance = new window.Typed(`#${id}`, {
    strings,
    typeSpeed: options.typeSpeed,
    smartBackspace: options.smartBackspace,
    backSpeed: options.backSpeed,

# Task specification
_What did the user ask to build? Any design decisions or other explanatory context_
用户的个人博客使用 Hexo + GitHub Pages，主题为 Redefine。该主题有一个副标题自动获取一言(hitokoto)的功能，但目前只有刷新页面才会重新获取新的一言。用户希望在副标题打字动画的退格(backspace)阶段完成后，自动获取一句新的一言句子，实现每轮打字动画循环展示不同的句子。

# Files and Functions
_What are the important files? In short, what do they contain and why are they relevant?_
**核心修改文件（源码）：**
- `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/plugins/typed.js` — typing 插件，包含 hitokoto fetch 和 Typed 实例创建逻辑。**需要修改此文件。**
- `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/build/plugins/typed.js` — 构建后的 minified 版本，**需同步修改。**

**关键函数和逻辑（typed.js 源码）：**
- `createTyped(id, strings, options)` — 创建 Typed 实例的封装函数，会先 destroy 旧实例再创建新实例
- `destroyInstance(id)` — 销毁 Typed 实例并清空 DOM 元素
- `initTyped(id)` — 入口函数，判断 hitokoto 是否启用：
  - **hitokoto 启用时 (L100-129)：** fetch API → 获取 quote 和 author → 拼接文本 → 调用 createTyped。**问题：只 fetch 一次，loop 只是重复相同文本。**
  - **hitokoto 未启用时 (L132-138)：** 使用配置中的固定 subtitle 文本数组
- `config` (L65-73) — 从 `theme.home_banner.subtitle` 导出配置参数

**Typed.js 实例创建参数 (L49-57)：**
```js
new window.Typed(`#${id}`, {
  strings,           // 要打字的字符串数组
  typeSpeed,         // 打字速度
  smartBackspace,    // 智能退格
  backSpeed,         // 退格速度
  backDelay,         // 退格延迟
  loop,              // 是否循环
  startDelay,        // 开始延迟
});
```

**Typed.js 关键回调（未在当前代码中使用，修改时可用）：**
- `onLastStringBackspaced(self)` — 所有字符串退格完成后触发，**这是注入重新获取 hitokoto 逻辑的最佳时机**
- `onComplete(self)` — 打字完成后触发
- `onDestroy(self)` — 实例销毁后触发

**调用链：**
- `main.js` L152-167 → 检查 `location.pathname === config.root` → 调用 `initTyped("subtitle")`
- `main.js` L83-86 → 页面刷新事件 `redefine:page:refresh` 监听器 → 触发 `initPage()` → 重新调用 `initTyped("subtitle")`

**配置文件 `_config.redefine.yml` (L133-144)：**
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.enable: true`
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.show_author: true`
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.api: https://v1.hitokoto.cn`
- `home_banner.subtitle.typing_speed: 100` / `backing_speed: 80`

# Task specification
_What did the user ask to build? Any design decisions or other explanatory context_
用户的个人博客使用 Hexo + GitHub Pages，主题为 Redefine。该主题有一个副标题自动获取一言(hitokoto)的功能，但目前只有刷新页面才会重新获取新的一言。用户希望在副标题打字动画的退格(backspace)阶段完成后，自动获取一句新的一言句子，实现每轮打字动画循环展示不同的句子。

# Files and Functions
_What are the important files? In short, what do they contain and why are they relevant?_
**核心修改文件（源码）：**
- `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/plugins/typed.js` — typing 插件，包含 hitokoto fetch 和 Typed 实例创建逻辑。**需要修改此文件。**
- `node_modules/hexo-theme-redefine/source/js/build/plugins/typed.js` — 构建后的 minified 版本，**需同步修改。**

**关键函数和逻辑（typed.js 源码）：**
- `createTyped(id, strings, options)` — 创建 Typed 实例的封装函数，会先 destroy 旧实例再创建新实例
- `destroyInstance(id)` — 销毁 Typed 实例并清空 DOM 元素
- `initTyped(id)` — 入口函数，判断 hitokoto 是否启用：
  - **hitokoto 启用时 (L100-129)：** fetch API → 获取 quote 和 author → 拼接文本 → 调用 createTyped。**问题：只 fetch 一次，loop 只是重复相同文本。**
  - **hitokoto 未启用时 (L132-138)：** 使用配置中的固定 subtitle 文本数组
- `config` (L65-73) — 从 `theme.home_banner.subtitle` 导出配置参数

**Typed.js 实例创建参数 (L49-57)：**
```js
new window.Typed(`#${id}`, {
  strings,           // 要打字的字符串数组
  typeSpeed,         // 打字速度
  smartBackspace,    // 智能退格
  backSpeed,         // 退格速度
  backDelay,         // 退格延迟
  loop,              // 是否循环
  startDelay,        // 开始延迟
});
```

**Typed.js 关键回调（未在当前代码中使用，修改时可用）：**
- `onLastStringBackspaced(self)` — 所有字符串退格完成后触发，**这是注入重新获取 hitokoto 逻辑的最佳时机**
- `onComplete(self)` — 打字完成后触发
- `onDestroy(self)` — 实例销毁后触发

**调用链：**
- `main.js` L152-167 → 检查 `location.pathname === config.root` → 调用 `initTyped("subtitle")`
- `main.js` L83-86 → 页面刷新事件 `redefine:page:refresh` 监听器 → 触发 `initPage()` → 重新调用 `initTyped("subtitle")`

**配置文件 `_config.redefine.yml` (L133-144)：**
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.enable: true`
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.show_author: true`
- `home_banner.subtitle.hitokoto.api: https://v1.hitokoto.cn`
- `home_banner.subtitle.typing_speed: 100` / `backing_speed: 80` / `starting_delay: 500` / `backing_delay: 1500`
- `home_banner.subtitle.loop: true` / `smart_backspace: true`
